🏆 High-Elo Ace Winner Playbook v9

PRESCRIPTIVE Per-turn: PRIMARY PLAY · YOU SWING · OPP THREATS (count + each attack with HIT/FAIL math) · DEFENSE RULE. Life trajectory shown at top of each side. Every number from verified replays.
Sample: 18,075 OP15-era ranked replays (2026-W12+, mode 0). Kept 1573 games where Ace WON and Ace player's Elo ≥ 2400.
1573verified Ace wins
18,075replays scanned
2400+Elo
8matchups
